nrqlQueries.query: FROM XMLRPC SELECT uniqueCount(id) as 'Devices' WHERE node = 'FOE' and online AND store.number = '{{tags.store.number}}' SINCE 1 day ago

FROM XMLRPC SELECT uniqueCount(id) as 'Devices' WHERE node = 'FOE' AND string(businessDate) = string(WayBusinessDay) AND WayState = 'OPEN' and state != 'Logged' AND store.number = '{{tags.store.number}}' SINCE 1 day ago

FROM (SELECT count(*) > 1 as 'count' from XMLRPC where string(WayBusinessDay) != string(businessDate) and node='FOE' facet  toDateTime(timestamp,'MM-dd-yyyy HH:mm') as 'Date', store.number as 'Store', node as 'Node', id as 'ID', ip as 'IP', type as 'Type', WayBusinessDay as 'Way Business Day', businessDate AS 'Business Date' LIMIT MAX) SELECT count(*) as 'Devices' WHERE count is true and store.number is not null and store.number = '{{tags.store.number}}' SINCE 1 day ago LIMIT MAX

SELECT count(*) as 'Devices'FROM (FROM XMLRPC SELECT count(*) as 'RPS Offline Count' where id like 'RPS%' and online='0' FACET store.number, id limit max) where store.number is not null and store.number IN ('{{tags.store.number}}') SINCE 1 day ago

SELECT latest(toDateTime(timestamp, 'MM-dd-yyyy HH:mm')) as 'Date' from XMLRPC where node = 'FOE' facet cases(where online = 1 as 'ONLINE', online = 0 as 'OFFLINE') as 'State', id as 'FOE ID' where store.number = '{{tags.store.number}}' SINCE 1 day ago LIMIT MAX

WITH ( SELECT latest(timestamp) from NrAiIncident SINCE 1 day ago) as duration FROM NrAiIncident select (duration - latest(openTime)) / 1000 / 60 as 'Duration (Minutes)'  where incidentId NOT IN (SELECT uniques(incidentId,10000) from NrAiIncident where conditionName like 'foe offline' and event = 'close' and tags.store.number = '{{tags.store.number}}' SINCE 1 month ago) and conditionName like 'foe offline' and event = 'open' and ((duration - openTime) / 1000 / 60) > 30 and tags.store.number = '{{tags.store.number}}' FACET incidentLink, tags.store.number as 'Store Number', tags.ID as 'FOE ID' SINCE 1 day ago LIMIT MAX

SELECT latest(toDateTime(timestamp, 'MM-dd-yyyy HH:mm')) as 'Date' from XMLRPC where node = 'FOE' facet state as 'State', id as 'FOE ID' where store.number = '{{tags.store.number}}' SINCE 1 day ago LIMIT MAX

WITH ( SELECT latest(timestamp) from NrAiIncident SINCE 1 day ago) as duration FROM NrAiIncident select (duration - latest(openTime)) / 1000 / 60 as 'Duration (Minutes)'  where incidentId NOT IN (SELECT uniques(incidentId,10000) from NrAiIncident where conditionName like 'foe not with logged In state' and event = 'close' and tags.store.number = '{{tags.store.number}}' SINCE 1 month ago) and conditionName like 'foe not with logged In state' and event = 'open' and ((duration - openTime) / 1000 / 60) > 30 and tags.store.number = '{{tags.store.number}}' limit max SINCE 1 day ago facet incidentLink, tags.store.number as 'Store Number', tags.ID as 'FOE ID'

widgets.title: FOE's with different business date than way station

nrqlQueries.query: FROM (SELECT count(*) > 1 as 'count' from XMLRPC where string(WayBusinessDay) != string(businessDate) and node='FOE' facet  toDateTime(timestamp,'MM-dd-yyyy HH:mm') as 'Date', store.number as 'Store', id as 'ID', ip as 'IP', type as 'Type', WayBusinessDay as 'Way Business Day', businessDate AS 'Business Date') SELECT Date as 'Date (UTC)', Store, ID as 'FOE ID', `Way Business Day`, `Business Date`, timestamp WHERE count is true and store.number is not null and store.number = '{{tags.store.number}}' SINCE 1 day ago LIMIT MAX

widgets.title: Open list of incidents for FOE with different business date than way station

nrqlQueries.query: WITH (SELECT latest(timestamp) from NrAiIncident SINCE 1 day ago) as duration FROM NrAiIncident select (duration - latest(openTime)) / 1000 / 60 as 'Duration (Minutes)'  where incidentId NOT IN (SELECT uniques(incidentId,10000) from NrAiIncident where conditionName like 'FOE with different business date than way station' and event = 'close' and tags.store.number = '{{tags.store.number}}' SINCE 1 month ago) and conditionName like 'FOE with different business date than way station' and event = 'open' and duration > 30 and tags.store.number = '{{tags.store.number}}' FACET incidentLink, tags.store.number as 'Store Number', tags.ID as 'FOE ID' SINCE 1 day ago LIMIT MAX

widgets.title: FOE's with different Package than way station

nrqlQueries.query: FROM (SELECT count(*) > 1 as 'count' from XMLRPC where string(WayPackage) != string(pkg) and node='FOE' facet  toDateTime(timestamp,'MM-dd-yyyy HH:mm') as 'Date', store.number as 'Store', id as 'ID', ip as 'IP', type as 'Type', WayBusinessDay as 'Way Business Day', businessDate AS 'Business Date') SELECT Date as 'Date (UTC)', Store, ID as 'FOE ID', `WayPackage` as 'Way Package', `pkg` as 'Package', timestamp WHERE count is true and store.number is not null and store.number = '{{tags.store.number}}' SINCE 1 day ago LIMIT MAX

widgets.title: Open list of incidents for FOE with different Package than way station

nrqlQueries.query: WITH (SELECT latest(timestamp) from NrAiIncident SINCE 1 day ago) as duration FROM NrAiIncident select (duration - latest(openTime)) / 1000 / 60 as 'Duration (Minutes)'  where incidentId NOT IN (SELECT uniques(incidentId,10000) from NrAiIncident where conditionName like 'FOE with different package than way station' and event = 'close' and tags.store.number = '{{tags.store.number}}' SINCE 1 month ago) and conditionName like 'FOE with different package than way station' and event = 'open' and duration > 30 and tags.store.number = '{{tags.store.number}}' FACET incidentLink, tags.store.number as 'Store Number', tags.ID as 'FOE ID' SINCE 1 day ago LIMIT MAX

SELECT latest(online)  from XMLRPC where id like 'RPS%' and online = '0' facet toDateTime(timestamp,'MM-dd-yyyy HH:mm') as 'Date (UTC)', store.number as 'Store', id as 'RPS ID' where store.number is not null and store.number = '{{tags.store.number}}' SINCE 1 day ago LIMIT MAX

widgets.title: Open list of incidents for RPS Offline

nrqlQueries.query: WITH ( SELECT latest(timestamp) from NrAiIncident SINCE 1 day ago) as duration FROM NrAiIncident select (duration - latest(openTime)) / 1000 / 60 as 'Duration (Minutes)'  where incidentId NOT IN (SELECT uniques(incidentId,10000) from NrAiIncident where conditionName like 'RPS offline' and event = 'close' and tags.store.number = '{{tags.store.number}}' SINCE 1 month ago) and conditionName like 'RPS offline' and event = 'open' and duration > 30 and tags.store.number = '{{tags.store.number}}' FACET incidentLink, tags.store.number as 'Store Number', tags.ID as 'RPS ID' SINCE 1 day ago LIMIT MAX
